PostToolUse.name: model-security-reminder
PostToolUse.description: Remind about access rules and sudo() when a model file is modified

hooks.prompt: Model file changed. Briefly remind: verify access rules exist in ir.model.access.csv and sudo() calls are justified. Suggest running /odoo-security --layer=access to audit. Keep it to 1-2 lines.

PostToolUse.name: controller-security-reminder
PostToolUse.description: Remind about route auth and CSRF when a controller file is modified

hooks.prompt: Controller file changed. Briefly remind: verify @http.route() has explicit auth= and csrf protection. Suggest running /odoo-security --layer=routes. Keep it to 1-2 lines.

PostToolUse.name: access-csv-changed
PostToolUse.description: Remind to validate access CSV completeness

hooks.prompt: Access CSV modified. Briefly remind: verify model_id:id format (model_ prefix, dots to underscores) and group references. Suggest running /odoo-security --layer=access. Keep it to 1-2 lines.

PostToolUse.name: wizard-security-reminder
PostToolUse.description: Remind about TransientModel access rules when a wizard file is modified

hooks.prompt: Wizard file changed. Briefly remind: TransientModel requires ir.model.access.csv entry with perm_create=1, perm_unlink=1. Suggest running /odoo-security --layer=access. Keep it to 1-2 lines.

PostToolUse.name: manifest-security-check
PostToolUse.description: Remind about security file ordering in manifest

hooks.prompt: Manifest changed. Briefly remind: verify security file order in data list — groups XML first, then ir.model.access.csv, then rules XML. Keep it to 1-2 lines.
